name: property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month, inefficient tracking of rental income causes cash flow gaps. We provide a real estate portfolio management tool instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of rental income and occupancy

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient tracking of rental income and occupancy
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month, inefficient tracking of rental income causes cash flow gaps. We provide a real estate portfolio management tool instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software

one_liner: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month, inefficient tracking of rental income causes cash flow gaps. We provide a real estate portfolio management tool instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
